description: Use this API to tabulate the output channel monitoring models referenced in the dynamic model. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = list_channel_models(status)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Category of channel monitoring models to be listed. (input; 0 by default).

status.description: only models monitoring equipment that exists in the power flow working case.
only models monitoring equipment that is not present in the power flow working case.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
